---
output: 
  html_document:
    css: custom_styles.css
---
#### Day 3 Goals
<b>Goals for Day 3: </b><br>
<img src = "./images/ggplot.png" alt = 'ggplot2 illustration' style = "float:right; width:375px;">
<span class = "capright"><a href="https://allisonhorst.com">Artwork by @allison_horst</a></span>

<ol>
<li>More advanced data wrangling</li>
<ul>
<li>Learn how to pivot data from long to wide and wide to long</li>
<li>Learn how to join tables</li>
<li>More advanced handling of NAs</li>
<li>Working with dates and times</li>
</ul>
<li>More advanced ggplot2:</li> 
<ul>
<li>Custom color palettes</li>
<li>Combining plots with facets and patchwork</li>
<li>Working with legends</li>
</ul>
<li>Coding best practices: design with the user in mind, even if that's you!</li>
<ul>
<li>Comment your code</li>
<li>Parameters, packages, datasets on top of script</li>
<li>Use consistent coding style</li>
<li>Logical object naming</li>
<li>Use projects instead of stand alone scripts where possible</li>
<li>Caution choosing packages for core work</li>
</ul>
</ol>

<br>
<b>Feedback: </b>Please leave feedback in the <a href="https://forms.office.com/g/vY0KbqxAXr">training feedback form</a>. You can submit feedback multiple times and don't need to answer every question. Responses are anonymous.
<br>
<br>

</details>
<br>
